user.title: Energy Planner
user.description: Select the Home Assistant entities used as planner inputs.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Energy Planner instance is allowed.

init.title: Energy Planner options
init.description: Configure planner behavior, time windows and SoC forecast settings.

data.min_baseline_kwh_per_hour: Minimum baseline consumption in kWh per hour
data.grid_charge_max_kw: Maximum grid charging power in kW
data.sun_start_required_minutes: Minimum solar start duration in minutes

error.forecast_horizon_hours: Forecast horizon must be at least 24 hours.
error.min_baseline_kwh_per_hour: Minimum baseline consumption must not be negative.
error.history_correction_percent: History correction must be greater than -100% and at most 500%.
error.grid_charge_max_kw: Maximum grid charging power must not be negative.
error.grid_charge_efficiency: Grid charging efficiency must be greater than 0 and at most 1.
error.soc_reserve_percent: SoC reserve must be between 0 and 100%.
error.soc_eps_kwh: SoC tolerance must not be negative.
error.sun_start_required_minutes: Minimum solar start duration must be greater than 0 minutes.
error.window: Time window must use HH:MM-HH:MM format.
error.windows: Windows must contain at least one valid HH:MM-HH:MM window.

export_debug.name: Export debug
export_debug.description: Export the last planner debug payload.
